title: Harden permissions, audit visibility and sensitive-data safety
requirements: Implement capabilities: memory.view_review_queue, memory.review_issues, memory.review_privacy_issues, memory.manage_search_index, memory.view_memory_access_audit.
Return 403 for users without required rights.
Filter source objects and search documents by server-side policy, not by UI controls.
Mask or omit raw paths unless the user has a service-level right.
Verify MemoryReviewAction and rendered pages do not include raw secret values, raw PII, full extracted text or raw query.
Ensure MemoryAccessAudit is shown only through safe fields.
